choose.when: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mem_member WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mem_member WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND del_flag = '0' AND create_time >= CURDATE() AND create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM mem_points_record WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND del_flag = '0' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(expense_amount),0) FROM fin_expense WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sale_amount),0) FROM fin_sale_record WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount),0) FROM fin_purchase WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(advance_amount),0) FROM fin_advance WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(expense_amount),0) FROM fin_expense WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0' AND expense_date >= CURDATE() AND expense_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sale_amount),0) FROM fin_sale_record WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0' AND sale_date >= CURDATE() AND sale_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(expense_amount),0) FROM fin_expense WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0' AND status='0'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(advance_amount),0) FROM fin_advance WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0' AND status='0'
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM mem_member WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND del_flag = '0' AND create_time >= #{date} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(expense_amount),0) FROM fin_expense WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0' AND expense_date >= #{date} AND expense_date < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sale_amount),0) FROM fin_sale_record WHERE dept_id=#{deptId} AND del_flag='0' AND sale_date >= #{date} AND sale_date < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
